sidebar.import_confirm_message: This will overwrite your current database with the selected one. This action CANNOT be undone and the application will restart. Are you sure you want to continue?

security.title: Extend Vault Unlock
security.desc: Add additional layers of unlocking to your vault.
security.totp_disable_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable 2FA? The current seed will be permanently destroyed.
security.totp_disable_subtitle: WARNING: After this action, you will need to delete the Vault account in your mobile app and reconfigure 2FA if you decide to use it again, in order for the synchronization to be valid.
security.totp_warning: Enabling 2FA through apps like Microsoft Authenticator can sync your seed to external servers (Microsoft cloud). This is your personal decision. Bóveda only stores the seed locally and encrypted. You are solely responsible for this choice. The seed itself is an open standard (RFC 6238) and never leaves your device. Only the app you choose can introduce cloud dependencies.
security.totp_scan_desc: Scan this QR code with your preferred authentication app.
security.totp_error_invalid: The code is incorrect. Please try again.
security.totp_success_desc: From now on, Bóveda will ask for a security code every time you unlock your vault.
security.totp_unlock_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authentication app.
security.totp_recovery_desc: Enter one of your recovery codes to disable 2FA and regain access.
security.totp_recovery_error: Invalid or already used recovery code.
security.totp_recovery_success: 2FA successfully disabled! You can now log in with just your master password. We recommend re-enabling 2FA as soon as possible.
security.totp_recovery_warning_setup: ⚠️ SAVE THESE CODES IN A SAFE PLACE. They are the only way to access your vault if you lose your mobile device.
security.pro_tip_desc: By enabling 2FA, you protect your vault even if your master password is compromised. Make sure you have access to your mobile device or save your recovery codes (if the app provides them).

theme.accent_description: The accent color customizes buttons, active icons, and highlighted elements. Bóveda will automatically generate light tones and glow effects based on your choice.
theme.bg_solid_desc: A uniform background color of your choice
theme.bg_image_click: It is recommended to use images with dark tones
theme.text_primary_desc: Color of titles and main content
theme.text_secondary_desc: Color of labels and supporting text

performance.description: Settings to optimize the experience with large volumes of data.
performance.massive_list_desc: Optimizes performance when managing large volumes of credentials. When enabled, the view switches to a virtualized list mode that only renders visible elements on screen, keeping the interface smooth even with thousands of records. Ideal for corporate or enterprise management environments.
performance.massive_list_threshold: Automatically activates when you exceed 100 credentials.

unlock_screen.new_vault_desc: Create your master password to protect your vault.
unlock_screen.unlock_vault_desc: Enter your master password to unlock.
unlock_screen.warning_new: ⚠️ This password cannot be recovered. Keep it in a safe place.

dashboard.title: Your Vault
dashboard.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this credential? This action cannot be undone.

general_view.accounts_desc: Manage your saved passwords and credentials.
general_view.pin_desc: Configure and manage your PIN codes securely.
general_view.tokens_desc: Generate and manage two-factor authentication (2FA) tokens.

about_view.title: Why trust Bóveda?
about_view.subtitle: Transparency, open source, and local security.
about_view.opensource_desc: Bóveda is an open-source project. This means anyone can review the code to ensure there are no backdoors or hidden telemetry.
about_view.local_desc: Your data never leaves your device. We do not use cloud servers, so you are the absolute owner of your information.
about_view.encryption_desc: Your entire vault is protected using advanced encryption standards.
about_view.update_info: To update this program, you must download the latest version from {link}

groups.pick_a_group: Choose a group for this credential

import_pack.title: Import Secure Package
import_pack.desc: Enter the password and choose how you want to integrate the data.
import_pack.password_error: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
